mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.name, f.description, f.category_id, f.image_url, f.price, f.rating, f.rating_count, f.status, f.created_by, f.created_at, f.updated_at, fc.id AS cat_id, fc.name AS cat_name, fc.description AS cat_description, ft.id AS tag_id, ft.name AS tag_name, ft.color AS tag_color, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.food_id = f.id) AS comments_count FROM foods f LEFT JOIN food_categories fc ON f.category_id = fc.id LEFT JOIN food_tag_relations ftr ON f.id = ftr.food_id LEFT JOIN food_tags ft ON ftr.tag_id = ft.id WHERE f.id = #{id}

SELECT f.id, f.name, f.rating, f.rating_count, f.image_url, fc.id AS cat_id, fc.name AS cat_name FROM foods f LEFT JOIN food_categories fc ON f.category_id = fc.id WHERE f.status = 'active' AND f.rating > 0 ORDER BY f.rating DESC, f.rating_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT AVG(rating) FROM foods WHERE status = 'active' AND rating > 0
